Description
org.projecthusky.fhir.core.ch.resource.extension.r4
 
org.projecthusky.fhir.core.ch.resource.r4
 
org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.common.resource
Custom HAPI resources (as extension of the official resources) for the CH-CORE and CH-EMED projects.
org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.resource
Custom HAPI resources (as extension of the official resources) for the CH-EMED-EPR project.

    ChCoreComposition
    The HAPI custom structure for CH-Core Composition.
    ChCoreCompositionEpr
    The HAPI custom structure for CH-Core Composition.
    ChCoreContactPointCarrier
    This interface implements common logic to entities that may contain, within their FHIR resource's telecom list, email addresses, phone numbers and/or email addresses as defined by CH Core.
    ChCoreContactPointCarrier.ContactPointRankComparator
    Comparator of contact points based on their conveyed rank.
